room.caption: [NightmareE2] Since you're taking the time to read this instead of playing a video game, I may as well take the time to inform you that you just died.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(105) global.mapTeleport=5
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates) instance_create(0,0,oVaultVisualControl)
colorControl=instance_create(0,0,oColorIndControl) colorControl.warnDelay=60
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(11) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: image_xscale=48; image_yscale=16 xDir=0 yDir=-4 shiftChange=32 doNotPause=0
